creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Are there remaining issues to be resolved, or is this just waiting for someone to commit?

- poudriere testport 10/11 i386/amd64 looks good
- `make test` reports lots of "TIFFFieldWithTag: Internal error, unknown tag 0xXXXX".
- portlint -C complains about patches not being generated with `make makepatch`, but otherwise looks good.
